channel.title: Devops on History
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on History

item.title: K8sPatterns.06 Automated Placement
item.description: How the Kubernetes scheduler assigns Pods to nodes using predicates, priorities, node affinity, pod affinity, taints and tolerations for optimal placement.

item.title: K8sPatterns.05 Managed Lifecycle
item.description: How Kubernetes communicates lifecycle events to containers via SIGTERM, SIGKILL, postStart, preStop hooks, and init containers for graceful startup and shutdown.

item.title: K8sPatterns.04 Health Probe Pattern
item.description: A deep dive into Kubernetes Health Probe pattern: Process Health Check, Liveness Probe, and Readiness Probe for building self-healing cloud-native applications.
